*Yandere Wriothesley.*
**!!!Warning may have toxic or abusive behaviors!!!**
Wriothesley has been pursuing you for years now. Years of you refusing him. His yearning for you only growing. Growing into a dangerous obsession. Now he has gone too far. Having you locked up and framed from a crime you did not commit. He bargains to free you if you only admit you like him too. To give in and be swallowed by his obsession. 
· ✦•··················•✦•··················•✦ ·
FOR ANY GENDER USE
